summary: Iteration 81: Tested 3 new features - Email notification service, Real-time guest order tracking with 4-step progress, Order status update API. Fixed critical React hooks bug in GuestOrdering component. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend guest ordering flow working end-to-end with tracking screen.

fixed_bugs.issue: React hooks error - useState for trackingData was declared after early return, violating Rules of Hooks
fixed_bugs.fix: Moved trackingData useState to top of component with other hooks

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: React hooks violation in GuestOrdering - useState must be called in same order on every render

success_rate.frontend: 100% (guest ordering auth, menu, cart, tracking all working)

seed_data_creation: Email log entries created during testing (demo_logged status)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 tested new email notification service and order tracking features. Email service logs to MongoDB when SENDGRID_API_KEY is not set (demo mode). Order tracking has 4 steps: received -> preparing -> delivering -> delivered. Frontend polls /api/guest-order/track/{order_id} every 5 seconds. IRD & Minibar panel is in EVENTS & CATERING sidebar group, not CULINARY OPERATIONS.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/email/send - logs custom email to DB
GET /api/guest-order/track/{order_id} - shows full history after updates
frontend_guest_order_tests: /guest-order auth screen loads with Room Number and Last Name inputs
Menu page shows All Day Menu with categories (Food & Dining, Beverages, Sundries, Amenities)
View Order button appears with cart count and total
Cart drawer opens with item details and special instructions
Order confirmation/tracking screen shows 4-step progress indicator
Order ID displayed on tracking screen
'Live tracking — updates every 5 seconds' text visible
'Order More' button works - returns to menu
frontend_enterprise_app_tests: Enterprise app loads with sidebar groups
CULINARY OPERATIONS group shows: Culinary, Pastry, Menu Design Studio, Food Gallery, Dish Assembly, Schedule, etc.
EVENTS & CATERING group contains IRD & Minibar
HR & ADMINISTRATION group contains Kitchen Routing
IRD & Minibar panel opens with 5 tabs (Dashboard, IRD Menu, Minibar, Orders, Guest Platform)
IRD Dashboard shows Active Orders, Total Orders, IRD Revenue, Minibar Revenue, Total Revenue, Menu Items
Recent Orders list shows order statuses (RECEIVED, DELIVERED, PREPARING)

mocked_apis.email_sending: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - logs to MongoDB instead (no SENDGRID_API_KEY configured)
